content_coverage: Component scopes (SingletonComponent, ActivityComponent, FragmentComponent, ViewModelComponent, ServiceComponent)

patterns_discovered.context: Recommended approach for ViewModels and regular classes
patterns_discovered.applicability: High - preferred method for better testability

patterns_discovered.context: Organizing DI modules by feature or concern
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintainability and clear separation of concerns

patterns_discovered.context: Using @Qualifier annotations to disambiguate multiple same-type dependencies
patterns_discovered.use_case: When providing multiple instances of the same type

patterns_discovered.context: Using appropriate @InstallIn components to control dependency lifecycle
Binding interfaces to implementations for testability

gotchas_discovered.context: Field injection with @Inject lateinit var should be avoided when possible
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Prefer constructor injection; use field injection only for Android framework classes

gotchas_discovered.context: Application class must be annotated with @HiltAndroidApp and registered in AndroidManifest.xml
gotchas_discovered.symptom: Hilt Android app must be annotated with @HiltAndroidApp error

gotchas_discovered.context: Activities and Fragments using field injection must be annotated with @AndroidEntryPoint
gotchas_discovered.symptom: Hilt Fragments must be attached to an @AndroidEntryPoint Activity

gotchas_discovered.context: Multiple @Provides methods providing the same type require qualifiers
gotchas_discovered.symptom: Multiple @Provides methods provide the same type error

gotchas_discovered.context: DatabaseModule notes that Room integration is a placeholder
gotchas_discovered.impact: Will need documentation updates when implemented

gotchas_discovered.context: Complex dependency graphs can create circular dependencies
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use Provider<T> or Lazy<T> for lazy initialization

key_achievements: Complete Hilt configuration guide covering all major concepts
Practical code examples for all injection patterns
Troubleshooting section with 6 common issues and solutions
Clear organization with table of contents and cross-references
Debugging tips and generated code locations

recommendations.suggestion: Update DI_SETUP.md when Room database integration is implemented to replace placeholder information
Add links to actual source code examples from the codebase (InventoryApplication, AppModule, DatabaseModule locations)
Add section on performance considerations with Hilt code generation and build times
Include example of debug configuration for verbose kapt logging in troubleshooting section
Add real-world example combining multiple patterns (e.g., NetworkModule with Retrofit setup)
Document version information (Hilt 2.48) and create plan for keeping dependency versions current
